display_text: Imp Claw, Cost: 0: Tier 4 Neutral item. Its Critical Strike passive empowers your next attack, guaranteeing a critical hit dealing 130% damage. Useful for securing kills with burst damage, especially on high-base-damage heroes or those looking to add guaranteed physical burst to their next hit. The effect has a short cooldown, allowing for frequent usage in skirmishes. Stats: CD: 5s, Crit Multiplier: 130%.
